'''''Condor''''' was an [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It accompanied the cruiser [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] on a number of occasions, at times when ''Liberty'' was not operating alone.
{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
